Vinayapiṭaka/Mahāvaggapāḷi/X/8.text: Desetu (Ka) [ ] Sī-Syā-potthakesu natthi, Mūlapaṇṇāsakepi Pāsarāsisutte brahmayācanā sakiṁ yeva āgatā.

Vinayapiṭaka/Mahāvaggapāḷi/X/12.text: Tathā tathā te (Sī, Syā) + Khu 1. 64 piṭṭhe Dhammapadepi.

Vinayapiṭaka/Mahāvaggapāḷi/X/14.text: Ettha “idaṁ dukkhaṁ ariyasaccanti ādīsu dukkhasamudayo dukkhanirodhoti vattabbe dukkhasamudayaṁ dukkhanirodhanti liṅgavipallāso kato”ti Paṭisambhidāmaggaṭṭhakathāyaṁ vuttaṁ. Visuddhimaggaṭīkāyaṁ pana uppādo bhayantipāṭhavaṇṇanāyaṁ “satipi dvinnaṁ padānaṁ samānādhikaraṇabhāve liṅgabhedo gahito, yathā dukkhasamudayo ariyasaccan”ti vuttaṁ. Tesu “dukkhasamudayo ariyasaccan”ti sakaliṅgikapāṭho “dukkhanirodhagāminī paṭipadā ariyasaccan”ti pāḷiyā sameti.

Vinayapiṭaka/Mahāvaggapāḷi/X/84.text: Vinodetuṁ vā vinodāpetuṁ vā (sabbattha, Vimativinodanīṭīkā oloketabbā)

Vinayapiṭaka/Mahāvaggapāḷi/X/240.text: Yāva arogo hoti, arogaṁ ākaṅkhamāno codessasīti (Ka) 2. Samanubhāsitvā (Sī)

Vinayapiṭaka/Mahāvaggapāḷi/X/241.text: Yāva arogo hoti, arogaṁ ākaṅkhamāno codessasīti (Ka) 2. Samanubhāsitvā (Sī)

Vinayapiṭaka/Mahāvaggapāḷi/X/332.text: Sacāhaṁ taṁ gahapati arogāpeyyaṁ (Sī), sacāhaṁ taṁ gahapati arogaṁ kareyyaṁ (Syā)

Vinayapiṭaka/Mahāvaggapāḷi/X/351.text: Dibbaṁ balaṁ sā labhate ca āyuṁ (Sī, Syā)

variants.reading: Dibbaṁ balaṁ sā labhate ca āyuṁ

Vinayapiṭaka/Mahāvaggapāḷi/X/450.text: Ito paraṁ syāmamūle diyaḍḍhagāthāhi abhabbapuggalā samattaṁ dassitā.
Dve dve mūlā katā tassa (Syā), dodotamūlakantassa (Ka)
